testsuite.name: JwtFilter (notifications) - Tests del filtro JWT

testcase.name: token inválido: no lanza excepción y continúa sin autenticar
token vacío después de Bearer: no lanza excepción
sin header Authorization: continúa sin autenticar

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-29T17:08:31.882-05:00 WARN 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en notifications: Malformed protected header JSON: Unable to deserialize: Unexpected character ('�' (code 65533 / 0xfffd)): expected a valid value (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 1] 2026-05-29T17:08:31.889-05:00 WARN 2464 --- [sportshop-notifications] [ Test worker] c.s.n.i.entry_points.JwtFilter : JWT inválido en notifications: CharSequence cannot be null or empty.
